title: Aajeeb's PvP Pack
description: This project Adds My style of Pvp Equipments. hopefully you enjoy them :D
body:
Get ready to change your Minecraft Player vs. Player experience by my new PACK! :D @Aajeeb99z! 

you can play in version 1.21 and 1.20.1 AND even 1.20!

This resource pack focuses PvP 
key feature is the introduction of smaller shield and small totem models, ensuring less screen obstruction so you can keep your focus locked on your opponent. also this pack has Low on fire so if you are burning by the fire aspect sword, you can still see the person who hit you!
